description_long: A white ceramic plate is arranged with eight golden-brown roasted chicken wings, fanned out in a circular pattern. At the center of the plate sits a wedge of fresh lemon, adding a touch of color and freshness to the presentation. The plate itself has a slightly irregular, hand-crafted edge, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The chicken wings are evenly spaced, with their crispy skin and browned tips visible from all angles. The lemon wedge is cut cleanly and positioned upright, making it easy to squeeze over the wings. The overall presentation suggests a dish ready to be served in a casual dining or outdoor urban setting.
description: A white ceramic plate holds eight roasted chicken wings arranged in a circle around a central lemon wedge, with a rustic, hand-crafted edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plate with all eight chicken wings radiating outward and the lemon wedge clearly visible at the center.
description_view_1: Rear view with the lemon wedge still visible but the wings' tips are more prominent and the plate's edge is more obscured.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the thickness of the plate and the even spacing of the chicken wings, with the lemon wedge partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view where the lemon wedge is angled away, and the wings' arrangement and plate's edge are clearly seen.
